title: Day 52 Lesson 2 - Video Repetition
html:
The focus of this repetition is on this sentence:

Sentence - すしやで　アルバイトを　しながら、　にほんごを　べんきょうして　います。= I'm studying  Japanese while working part-time in a sushi restaurant.

How to use this lesson - When the repeat message shows and the video pauses, please repeat the sentence you have just heard. Keep practising until you can repeat perfectly!
